title: All Items
description: Try to collect every item as fast as possible to finish the challenge.
body:
# Description
An item will appear on your screen and you must collect it. Collect all items this way to win. Holding an item in your hand counts as collecting it.


![game view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/arvJvIQR/images/583ae84d8f80a9ada943d1018a841460cda4372a_350.webp)

The boss bar shows how many items you have already collected.


# Commands
```
/start
```
> starts the game

```
/set_timer 1 2 3 4   (requires cheats)
```
> sets the timer to 1 day, 2 hours, 3 minutes and 4 seconds


```
/skip_item   (requires cheats)
```
> skips the current item


```
/obtaining
```
> shows a guide on how to obtain the current item (only works with minecraft vanilla items)

# Languages
- English
- German

Do you speak another language? I’d be happy if you sent me a translation.
